name: monocle
title: Monocle
description:
Extension to control Monocle for macOS

Noise-cancelling for your screen with cursor shake
author: emlez

commands.name: toggle
commands.title: Toggle Overlay
commands.subtitle: Turn overlay on or off
commands.description: Toggle the Monocle overlay on or off

commands.name: on
commands.title: Turn Overlay On
commands.subtitle: Enable the overlay
commands.description: Turn the Monocle overlay on

commands.name: off
commands.title: Turn Overlay Off
commands.subtitle: Disable the overlay
commands.description: Turn the Monocle overlay off

commands.name: toggle-mode
commands.title: Toggle Focus Mode
commands.subtitle: Switch between Ambient and Deep
commands.description: Toggle the focus mode between Ambient and Deep

commands.name: ambient
commands.title: Ambient Mode
commands.subtitle: Gradient overlay
commands.description: Set focus mode to Ambient (gradient overlay)

commands.name: deep
commands.title: Deep Focus Mode
commands.subtitle: Fullscreen overlay
commands.description: Set focus mode to Deep (fullscreen overlay)

commands.name: toggle-ignore
commands.title: Toggle App Exclusion
commands.subtitle: Include or exclude current app
commands.description: Toggle the currently focused app in or out of the Monocle ignore list

commands.name: ignore
commands.title: Exclude Current App
commands.subtitle: Add app to ignore list
commands.description: Exclude the currently focused app from the Monocle overlay

commands.name: unignore
commands.title: Include Current App
commands.subtitle: Remove app from ignore list
commands.description: Include the currently focused app in the Monocle overlay

commands.name: set-blur
commands.title: Set Blur
commands.subtitle: Blur intensity
commands.description: Set the Monocle blur intensity (0–100)

commands.name: set-grain
commands.title: Set Grain
commands.subtitle: Grain intensity
commands.description: Set the Monocle grain intensity (0–100)

commands.name: toggle-monochrome
commands.title: Toggle Monochrome
commands.subtitle: Turn monochrome on or off
commands.description: Toggle the Monocle monochrome effect on or off

commands.name: monochrome-on
commands.title: Turn Monochrome On
commands.subtitle: Enable monochrome
commands.description: Turn the Monocle monochrome effect on

commands.name: monochrome-off
commands.title: Turn Monochrome Off
commands.subtitle: Disable monochrome
commands.description: Turn the Monocle monochrome effect off

commands.name: set-monochrome
commands.title: Set Monochrome
commands.subtitle: Monochrome intensity
commands.description: Set the Monocle monochrome intensity (0–100)

commands.name: set-tint-preset
commands.title: Set Tint Preset
commands.subtitle: Pick a tint color
commands.description: Set the Monocle tint to a preset color

commands.name: set-tint-opacity
commands.title: Set Tint Opacity
commands.subtitle: Tint opacity
commands.description: Set the Monocle tint opacity (0–100)

commands.name: set-tint-hex
commands.title: Set Tint Color (Hex)
commands.subtitle: Custom tint color
commands.description: Set the Monocle tint to a custom RRGGBB hex color

commands.name: display-per-screen
commands.title: Per-Screen Display Mode
commands.subtitle: Render per screen
commands.description: Render the Monocle overlay on each screen independently

commands.name: display-global
commands.title: Global Display Mode
commands.subtitle: Render globally
commands.description: Render the Monocle overlay anchored to one screen

commands.name: toggle-app-wide-focus
commands.title: Toggle App-Wide Focus
commands.subtitle: Show all windows from active app
commands.description: Toggle showing all windows from the focused app

commands.name: app-wide-focus-on
commands.title: Turn App-Wide Focus On
commands.subtitle: Enable showing all windows
commands.description: Turn app-wide focus on (show all windows from the focused app)

commands.name: app-wide-focus-off
commands.title: Turn App-Wide Focus Off
commands.subtitle: Disable showing all windows
commands.description: Turn app-wide focus off

commands.name: open-settings
commands.title: Open Settings
commands.subtitle: Open the settings window
commands.description: Open the Monocle settings window

commands.name: check-updates
commands.title: Check for Updates
commands.subtitle: Run Monocle's update check
commands.description: Check for Monocle updates

commands.name: quit-monocle
commands.title: Quit Monocle
commands.subtitle: Quit the app
commands.description: Quit the Monocle app

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
